name: Succulent Sour Cream Pot-Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the pot-roast in flour.
2. Brown all sides of the meat in cooking oil in a Dutch oven.
3. Slip a rack under the meat and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Add water, garlic, onion, tomato sauce, bay leaf, and thyme to the pot.
5. Cover and cook in a slow oven (325 degrees F.) for 3 hours or until tender.
6. Cook sliced mushrooms in butter in a small frying pan until tender and golden.
7. When the meat is tender, remove it to a cutting board.
8. Remove the bay leaf.
9. Thicken the cooking liquid with 2 tablespoons flour combined with 1/4 cup water, if desired.
10. Add mushrooms and sour cream to the cooking liquid; cook over moderate heat but do not allow to boil.
11. Slice the beef.
12. Serve with hot buttered noodles sprinkled with paprika. Pass any remaining sauce separately.
